events.description: A policy excerpt states that hourly workers should record all time worked and report missed breaks to a supervisor.
events.source_excerpt_or_reference: All hourly personnel should record all time worked. Missed breaks, interrupted breaks, and post-shift work should be reported to a supervisor.

events.description: Jordan starts a temporary inventory coordinator assignment at Riverbend Components LLC.
events.notes: Start date appears in intake notes and termination notice.

events.description: Jordan reports being told to finish inventory reconciliation after clocking out.
events.notes: Intake summary references off-clock work but source documents do not yet include payroll detail.

events.description: Jordan asks Morgan whether post-shift reconciliation work should be entered on the timesheet.
events.source_excerpt_or_reference: If we are asked to finish the variance report after clock-out, should that time be added to the time sheet?

events.description: Jordan sends a written question about whether post-shift inventory reconciliation should be recorded as paid time.
Jordan records a note that post-shift inventory reconciliation continued for approximately twenty minutes.
events.notes: Personal notes support recollection but payroll records are missing.

events.description: Jordan records a note that a variance report was completed after the scheduled shift.
events.notes: Needs corroboration from system logs or timesheets.

events.description: Avery Patel recalls Jordan raising timekeeping concerns during a team huddle.
events.notes: The note is retrospective and should be reviewed with the witness.
events.source_excerpt_or_reference: I remember Jordan asking during the huddle whether the variance report time was supposed to be paid if done after the shift.

events.description: Avery Patel states that Jordan raised the timekeeping concern during a team huddle.
events.notes: Witness note is dated after the event and should be reviewed.

events.description: Morgan Lee issues a written warning for incomplete cycle-count reconciliation.
events.notes: Jordan disputes whether the warning omitted staffing and access issues.

events.description: Jordan disputes the written warning and requests the referenced attachment.
events.notes: The attachment is referenced but missing from the sample matter.
events.source_excerpt_or_reference: The warning mentions an attached reconciliation log, but I do not see the attachment. Please send the log so I can respond accurately.

events.description: Morgan Lee sends a notice ending Jordan's temporary assignment.
events.notes: Notice gives performance as the reason, but supporting documents are incomplete.
events.source_excerpt_or_reference: Your temporary assignment is ending effective today based on continuing reconciliation errors and failure to complete assigned closeout tasks.

events.description: Morgan Lee ends Jordan's assignment after a disputed performance meeting.
events.notes: Termination notice exists, but decision-maker chain is incomplete.

events.description: HR acknowledges receiving Jordan's draft concerns and says the records will be reviewed.
events.notes: Acknowledgment does not concede the facts or legal significance.
events.source_excerpt_or_reference: We acknowledge receipt of your concerns and will review available timekeeping, scheduling, and performance records.

legal_advice_boundary: This artifact is not legal advice and does not replace attorney judgment. It organizes matter materials for qualified human/legal review.
